title: Delhi High Court refers dispute over Rang De Lal (Oye Oye) song in Dhurandhar 2 to mediation
description: The Delhi High Court on Thursday referred a copyright dispute between Trimurti Films and filmmaker Aditya Dhar’s B62 Studios over the “Rang De Lal (Oye Oye)” song in the Hindi film Dhurandhar 2, to mediation [Trimurti Films Vs B62].Justice Tushar Rao Gedela observed that the controversy appeared to be primarily financial in nature and indicated that the parties could work out a resolution, including issues of royalty and compensation, through mediation.The Court also directed that a senior media
